backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a medical management app defining data types (Patient, Staff, Spending, Attendance, Sessions) and CRUD operations with role-based access control via AccessControl and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (category reports, finance summary, PDF/Excel export) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, recent changes, and key exports for build planning reference.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a div#root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, theme provision, and client-side routing between all application pages via a currentPage state variable.
frontend/src/components/AIPrescriptionPa: Panel component for generating AI-assisted treatment prescriptions, offering predefined treatment templates and a rich-text editor for customizing and exporting treatment plans.
frontend/src/components/CategoryReportSe: Reusable report section component that displays filtered, date-range-scoped expense entries for a single spending category with subtotals and PDF, Excel, and print export actions plus inline edit support.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDialog.ts: A reusable confirmation dialog component built on AlertDialog that displays a title, description, and Cancel/Continue buttons with an optional loading state.
frontend/src/components/FinanceSummarySe: Displays a filterable finance summary table grouped by spending category with date range filters and export options for PDF, Excel, and print.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component showing the clinic name, copyright year, and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The main navigation header with links to all app pages, a theme toggle, and a logout button using a dropdown menu for smaller screens.
frontend/src/components/LiveRegion.tsx: Renders two screen-reader-only ARIA live regions (polite and assertive) to announce dynamic messages for accessibility.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: The login page displaying clinic branding, a feature list, and an Internet Identity login button with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/MiscExpenseDialo: A dialog form for creating or editing a miscellaneous expense, with fields for category, description, amount, and date.
frontend/src/components/PatientDialog.ts: A tabbed dialog for adding or editing a patient record, covering basic info, treatments, AI prescription generation, and payment fields.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: File content was not provided; no summary available.
frontend/src/components/SessionEditDialo: A dialog component for editing an existing patient session, allowing updates to check-in/out times, visit number, progress percentage, treatment package, and duration via form inputs.
frontend/src/components/SkipToContent.ts: A simple accessibility component that renders a 'Skip to main content' anchor link for keyboard navigation.
frontend/src/components/SpendingDialog.t: A dialog form component for creating or editing a spending/expense record, with fields for category, description, amount, and date.
frontend/src/components/StaffDialog.tsx: A dialog form component for adding or editing a staff member, with fields for name, position, phone, pay rate, and qualifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAnnouncer.ts: A Zustand store hook that provides a screen-reader announcement utility supporting both polite and assertive ARIA live region modes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for CRUD operations on patients, staff, spending, sessions, and other backend entities, wrapping actor calls with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and includes styles for accessibility, React Quill editor, and print layouts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying clinic summary statistics (patients, staff, revenue, debt, net income) as cards and a recent patients table, with navigation buttons to other sections.
frontend/src/pages/DataBackupPage.tsx: Data backup management page supporting export to JSON, import/merge from JSON file, and full data reset, with progress indicators and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/FinancePage.tsx: Finance management page with tabbed views for a summary, per-category spending reports, and miscellaneous expenses, supporting add/edit/delete operations via dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/OwnerDashboardPage.ts: Owner dashboard page for monitoring staff location history, with filters by staff member and date range and links to Google Maps for each recorded location.
frontend/src/pages/PatientReportPage.tsx: Displays a comprehensive patient report with summary statistics (totals for patients, revenue, debt, treatments) and a detailed table, with options to print, export as PDF, or download a CSV file.
frontend/src/pages/PatientSessionsPage.t: Manages patient check-in/check-out sessions, allowing staff to record visits with treatment package info, filter/search sessions, and edit check-in or check-out timestamps via dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/PatientsPage.tsx: Provides a searchable patient management table with functionality to add, edit, delete, and reset all patient records using mutation hooks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/StaffAttendancePage.t: Handles staff clock-in/clock-out with optional geolocation capture, displays attendance records filterable by staff member, and supports editing clock-in and clock-out times via dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/StaffPage.tsx: Provides a searchable staff management table with functionality to add, edit, delete, and reset all staff members using mutation hooks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/StaffReportPage.tsx: A staff report page that displays summary cards (total staff, unique positions, most common role) and a full staff table, with buttons to print, export PDF (stub), or export CSV/Excel.
frontend/src/utils/reportExport.ts: Utility module providing functions to export finance data as CSV/Excel files and print-to-PDF via a new browser window, covering both per-category reports and the overall finance summary.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that sets up dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and registers the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the clinic management system's existing features, including categorized expense reports, finance summary, PDF/Excel export, editable entries, and print-optimized layouts.
